## Checklist

- [ ] Tests written first (TDD): a failing test described the behavior before the implementation ([CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/canartuc/slashmebaby/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally with zero warnings
- [ ] `npx vitest run` is green locally, and `npx vitest run --coverage` meets the thresholds
- [ ] `npx playwright test` is green locally
- [ ] PR title follows conventional commit format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `test:`, `docs:`, `chore:`)
- [ ] AI assistance disclosed below per [AI_CONTRIBUTIONS.md](https://github.com/canartuc/slashmebaby/blob/main/AI_CONTRIBUTIONS.md) (or none was used)
